examples: Also, suggests the existing problems and future research directions of corn phytoalexin.
Resveratrol, 3,4', 5-trihydroxystilbene, is a phytoalexin found in grapes, Polygonum Cuspidatum and other plants.
Substances such as lignin, phytoalexin, active oxygen, salicylic acid are known to play important roles on the plant disease resistance.
